title: Universal Font Tester
description: Instantly preview and test any Minecraft font with easy in-game commands — ideal for creators, resource-pack artists, and modpack designers.
body: **![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_4bbe84a8-982d-4ffb-a12e-31c382aa9a00.png)** # **Universal Font Tester** Instantly preview and test any Minecraft font with easy in-game commands — ideal for **all players**, **creators**, and **resource-pack artists**. This lightweight datapack lets you display entire character sets (Latin, Greek, Cyrillic, and symbols) directly in your world with one simple command. *** ## 🧩 **What It Does** The **Universal Font Tester** datapack allows you to **visualize and test fonts in real time**, right inside Minecraft. It’s especially useful when: * Installing a new **resource pack** that changes the font * Testing readability for **menus, chat, quests, or GUIs** * Creating your own **custom typeface** and wanting to check spacing and accents * Or simply exploring Minecraft’s text rendering with a fun visual showcase You can instantly display full alphabets, numbers, and special characters, all formatted in neat chat previews. *** ## ⚙️ **How To Use** After installing the datapack in your world, run: ``` /reload /function fonttester:help ``` You’ll receive a clickable in-game help menu with all available showcase commands. ### ✨ Available Commands Each command instantly prints a font sample directly in your chat. | Command |Description | | ---------------------------------- |-------------------------------------------------- | | /function fonttester:help |Displays the clickable help menu with all commands | | /function fonttester:show/ascii |Basic Latin (A–Z, numbers, punctuation) | | /function fonttester:show/latin |Extended Latin and accented characters | | /function fonttester:show/greek |Greek alphabet | | /function fonttester:show/cyrillic |Cyrillic alphabet | | /function fonttester:show/symbols |Common symbols and icons | | /function fonttester:full |Displays all characters and symbols in one view | |   | | 💡 **Tip:** Place your font resource pack **at the top** of your list to ensure your custom font is used during testing. ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1369907/description_177e37e3-ab23-4382-b77f-209020ea909b.png) ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1369907/description_02d298c8-4828-4abd-a864-2e504a4537d5.png) *** ## 🎯 **Why Use It?** ✅ No setup required — works instantly after install ✅ Great for creators who design GUIs, menus, or RPG-style interfaces ✅ Supports all modern Minecraft versions ✅ Lightweight and multiplayer-friendly ✅ 100% client-side compatible (safe to use in any world) *** ## 🧱 **Compatibility** | Minecraft Version |Compatibility | | ----------------- |------------------ | | 1.21.x |✅ Fully compatible | | 1.20.x |✅ Fully compatible | | 1.19.x |✅ Compatible | | 1.18.x |✅ Compatible | | 1.17.x |✅ Compatible | | 1.16.x |✅ Compatible | *** ##
